channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Venezuela Fury marries Noah Price in Isle of Man with unique bridal style and six-tiered cake
item.description: Venezuela Fury, aged 16, and her partner Noah Price, 19, celebrated their wedding at the Victorian Royal Chapel of St John's in the Isle of Man. The event, described by Molly-Mae Hague as 'beautiful',...

item.title: A Look Back at People and Their Simca Cars from the 1930s to 1960s
item.description: During the mid-20th century, Simca cars were more than just vehicles; they were symbols of freedom, prosperity, and personal style across Europe. From the compact Simca 5 to the sporty 1200S, these ca...

item.title: Historical Photographs of Thérèse of Lisieux Portraying Joan of Arc
item.description: Thérèse of Lisieux (1873–1897), also known as the Little Flower of Jesus, was a French Discalced Carmelite nun who is widely venerated today. Deeply inspired by the patriotic deeds of French heroines,...

item.title: Daily Entertainment Highlights from Sowetan – May 15, 2026
item.description: Sowetan’s daily lunchtime read for May 15, 2026, covers a variety of entertainment and sports stories. Rising star Nikita Mashishi talks about her latest acting role in the upcoming Mzansi Bioskop fil...

item.title: Nova Scotian Paul Boutilier, NHL and curling figure, remembered for humility and contributions to sport
item.description: Paul 'Boots' Boutilier, a native of Sydney, Nova Scotia, has passed away at the age of 63. Boutilier's life was marked by remarkable achievements both on and off the ice. As a defenceman, he was a fir...

item.title: B.C. couple hospitalised and isolated after presumptive hantavirus diagnosis
item.description: A couple in British Columbia is currently in hospital isolation after testing presumptive positive for the Andes hantavirus, linked to the cruise ship M.V. Hondius. The couple, among four Canadians co...

item.title: Visayas power grid placed on yellow alert due to high demand and plant shutdowns
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The Visayas power grid was placed on yellow alert yesterday from 5 to 8 p.m. due to high electricity demand and the temporary shutdown of several major coal-fired power plants, t...

item.title: Semenyo’s decisive goal secures FA Cup victory for Manchester City over Chelsea
item.description: Manchester City claimed the FA Cup with a 1-0 victory over Chelsea, thanks to a stunning individual effort from Antoine Semenyo. The winning goal came in the 72nd minute when Semenyo, positioned in th...

item.title: Andhra Pradesh government announces financial incentives to encourage higher birth rates
item.description: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu has announced that the state government will provide financial incentives to families for having more children, in an effort to address the declining bi...

item.title: Mitchell Johnson on the pressures facing AFL coaches and overreliance on data
item.description: Mitchell Johnson reflects on the intense pressures faced by AFL coaches, emphasising how the role often becomes a scapegoat for a club's underperformance. Using the recent departure of Michael Voss fr...

item.title: Yukon resident in B.C. tests presumptive positive for hantavirus after cruise exposure
item.description: British Columbia’s provincial health officer, Dr. Bonnie Henry, has confirmed that one of four Canadians isolating in B.C. following exposure on a cruise ship affected by a hantavirus outbreak has rec...

item.title: Falana disputes Trump’s claim, says ISIS Commander was killed by Nigerian troops in 2024
item.description: Human rights lawyer Femi Falana don call out President Donald Trump say him no dey sincere over the claim about the death of ISIS Commander Abu-Bilal al-Mainuki. Trump tok say the commander, whom e ca...

item.title: Six Migrants Found Dead in Train Boxcar in Texas; Authorities Investigate Human Smuggling
item.description: Authorities in Laredo, Texas, discovered six deceased migrants inside a Union Pacific train boxcar on Sunday. The victims, comprising three men from Honduras and a woman and two men from Mexico, are b...

item.title: BRICS meeting in Delhi ends with no joint statement amid Iran-UAE tensions
item.description: Top diplomats from BRICS nations, including Iran and the UAE, wrapped up a two-day meeting in Delhi on Friday without issuing a joint statement, highlighting significant divisions within the bloc. Ira...

item.title: Prominent Mpumalanga Rhino Poaching Suspect Killed in Shooting
item.description: Joseph “Big Joe” Nyalungu, a well-known businessman and suspected rhino poaching kingpin, was fatally shot at a crossroad near his business premises in Mkhuhlu, Mpumalanga, on Saturday. The attack fol...

item.title: Analyst Calls for Independent Probe into Recent Senate Shooting Incident
item.description: An analyst has recommended the creation of an independent body to thoroughly investigate the shooting incident that occurred inside the Philippine Senate. The event took place on May 13, 2026, when gu...

item.title: The Life and Tragic Death of Ndugu M’Hali, Companion of Explorer Henry Morton Stanley
item.description: Ndugu M’Hali, also known as Kalulu, was an African boy born around 1865 in what is now Tanzania. Captured as a child during a slave raid, he was sold in Tabora and later acquired by the Victorian expl...

item.title: Barcelona Women Complete Domestic Treble Ahead of Champions League Final
item.description: Barcelona women's football team don show say dem dey unstoppable for Spain as dem clinch the domestic treble on Saturday by beating Atletico Madrid 3-1 for Copa de la Reina final. Players wey score be...

item.title: House Democrats Reveal DOJ Redacted Document Potentially Identifying Epstein Co-Conspirators
item.description: During a shadow hearing in Palm Beach, Florida, House Oversight Committee Democrats highlighted a key document that could reveal the identities of Jeffrey Epstein's co-conspirators. Representative Raj...

item.title: BARMM Political Parties to Conduct Voter Education for First Parliamentary Elections
item.description: COTABATO CITY, Philippines — Officials from four major political parties in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM) have pledged to help educate voters ahead of the region's first-...
